explanations.37: The `= true` sets a default value, so if someone doesn't pass a `lazy` prop, it will behave as if they passed `lazy={true}`.
explanations.41: This hook translates a relative image path into the correct full URL based on where your website is deployed, so images work whether the site is at the root or in a subfolder.
explanations.45: The `clsx` function combines multiple CSS class names together—it always includes `"card__image"` and adds any extra classes from the `className` prop if provided.
explanations.50: If `lazy` is true, this sets `loading="lazy"` on the image tag; if false, it sets it to `undefined` (which means no loading attribute at all, so the browser loads it immediately).
